question: What are the specific obligations of the Service Provider under Article 5 regarding indemnification?
reference_context: 5.1 Service Provider shall indemnify and hold harmless Company from any claims arising from Service Provider's negligent performance or willful misconduct.
expected_answer: The Service Provider is obligated to indemnify and hold harmless the Company from any claims arising from the Service Provider's negligent performance or willful misconduct.

question: How long must confidential information be protected according to Article 4?
reference_context: 4.2 Confidential information shall be protected for a period of five (5) years after termination of this Agreement.
expected_answer: Confidential information must be protected for a period of five (5) years after the termination of the Agreement.

question: What limitations are placed on the Service Provider's use of Company's confidential information under Article 3?
reference_context: 3.3 Company grants Service Provider a limited license to use Company's confidential information solely for performance of services under this Agreement.
expected_answer: The Service Provider is granted a limited license to use the Company's confidential information solely for the performance of services under the Agreement.

question: What are the specific obligations under Article 6 regarding termination notice and post-termination actions?
reference_context: 6.1 Either party may terminate this Agreement with sixty (60) days written notice. 6.2 Company may terminate immediately for material breach that remains uncured for thirty (30) days after written notice. 6.3 Upon termination, all confidential information shall be returned or destroyed within thirty (30) days.
expected_answer: Either party can terminate with 60 days' notice. Immediate termination is possible for a material breach uncured for 30 days after notice. Post-termination, confidential information must be returned or destroyed within 30 days.

question: What is the governing law and dispute resolution method as per Article 7?
reference_context: 7.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of California. 7.2 Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in San Francisco, California.
expected_answer: The governing law is California. Disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration in San Francisco, California.

question: Who are the executing parties of the agreement and what are their titles?
reference_context: Executed on March 1, 2026. TECHCORP INC. By: /s/ John Smith Name: John Smith Title: CEO LEGAL SERVICES LLC By: /s/ Sarah Johnson Name: Sarah Johnson Title: Managing Member
expected_answer: The executing parties are John Smith, CEO of TechCorp Inc., and Sarah Johnson, Managing Member of Legal Services LLC.
